fault: Two claimed macros are bare primitives relabeled; S/T also collide with conventional Weil generator names.
correction: Suspend this as macro grammar. Treat it only as deprecated executable selector shorthand in its original balanced-window context. True macro grammar is earned iterative QBL words read through Orthad.

source_defect: The same letters S and T were used for PC macro labels and Weil generators.
fault: Prior tests could compare objects by name rather than structure.
correction: Use PC branch names PC_REF, PC_HOLD, PC_LFT for deprecated selector shorthands; reserve Weil_F_N for finite Fourier generator and Weil_G_N for quadratic Gauss diagonal generator.

source_defect: No-shadow-in-lift law was written broadly across Law 0b, Law 2, Law 3, Follow section, and checklist.
fault: Correctly excludes scalar terminal coefficients, but incorrectly excludes retained orientation-residue vector and cross-orientation coupling.
correction: Scalar mock-theta coefficient/readout remains external. Orientation-residue vector and cross-orientation pairing are retained state and may be carried inside the lift.

source_defect: Orthad lens was forced diagonal one-entry-per-axis.
fault: A diagonal-only lens can encode Weil_G/T-type self phase but structurally cannot encode dense Weil_F/S-type off-diagonal Fourier pairing.
correction: Keep axis-stack diagonal inheritance for latched axes, but add an orientation-index block allowed to carry retained cross-orientation pairings.
